ddt:Target.Name: Sacha_6300_531_V3.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Sacha_6300_531_V3.0(AJO): -Added X62 application
Sacha_6300_531_V2.0(AJO): -Added application X07ph2
Sacha_6300_520_V1.0-->Sacha_6300_531_V1.0 ------------------------
- Added Auto Identification for 6300_ 531 / 532 / 533 / 534 / 535 / 540 / 541 / 542 / 543 / 544 / 545 (VDiag $04) - Created ''Configuration SACHA'' list with internal parameters in <<DEVICES>> - Updated all Datas&Requests names by moving the hexadecimal code of the associated DID at the begining of the name (ex: SACHA supervisor state ($2001) -->($2001) SACHA supervisor state) ----------------------------------- Sacha_6300_520_V1.0 --------------------------------------------------- Starting base: Sacha_6300_503_V1.0 DID:a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_scx_xx_e_a.v9.0 DTC:a_dg_dft_cfg_failxxx_scx_xx_e_a.v7.0
-Added new Auto-Ident for software versions: SC_520( Vdiag $04); SC_521( Vdiag $04);SC_522( Vdiag $04);SC_530( Vdiag $04);SC_550( Vdiag $04); -DID number for label Vsx_gb_sys_stt is modified from $2002 to $615D -DID number for label Vsx_vh_chd_stt is modified from $2003 to $615E -DID number for label Vsx_evc_stt_req is modified from $2005 to $615F -DID Modified because number for label Vsx_mns_cm_v_stt is modified from $6037 to $2002 -DID Modified because number for label Vsx_mns_dlg_wi is modified from $612B to $2003 -DID modified because number for label Vxx_mns_cm_dyc_wi is modified from $600F to $2005 -Deleted DIDs: $605B (SC_500 CR1 RM413 Deleted from specification) $6138 (SC_500 CR1 RM413 Deleted from specification) $613F (SC_400 CR2 RM376 SC_520_CR1 RM478 : Deleted DID) $6143 (SC_400 CR2 RM376 SC_520_CR1 RM442 : Deleted DID) -Deleted screen <<SACHA supervisor state <= version SC_401>> -Made functional the button which allows writing of ''Plug unlock when RMS current is still present configuration ($6159)'' -Fault type $13 replaced with $19 for DTC $0768 -Added DTC $076C Flt $96 -DID $2002 passed from Numeric to Numeric List(same states as $6155)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic
Data.Comment: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

Data.Name: ($FD66) Quick sleeping - DON'T ALLOW WRITTING IN DATAFLASH
($FD03) Raw CPU temperature value from BI
($FD10) J1772 control pilot raw duty cycle
($FD1B) State of Enable HV sensor supply diag
($FD20) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for RSA plug type 1
($FD21) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for RSA plug type 2
($FD22) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for Nissan plug type 1
($FD23) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for Nissan plug type 2
($FD36) Real-time clock periodical wakeup request delay (in secondes)
($FD37) Raw I_CTRLPILOT analog input ADC input
($FD3B) Diag of H bridge N side
($FD3C) Diag of H bridge P side
($FD47) Fuse box interlock raw ADC input
($FD4B) BCM wakeup command raw ADC input
($FD4C) EVC wakeup command raw ADC input
($FD59) Wire Water temperature raw ADC input
($FD61) Request to turn CHAdeMO CAN on
($FD63) Status of real-time clock periodical wakeup function
($FD65) Enables sending on pin90 of the 20MHz clock in order to verify resonnator frequency during EOL test
($2005) J1772 control pilot raw duty cycle
($600C) Raw CPU temperature value from BI
($6028) J1772 control pilot duty cycle validity status
($602E) EVC HV battery current request value
($6034) Stored Mains plug locking consolated state
($6036) Wake-Up request from Mains or plug presence
($603E) No reply form CHAdeMO spot after CAN initialization
($603F) Reply form CHAdeMO spot after CAN initialization
($6041) Request to turn CHAdeMO CAN on
($6042) Confirmed loss of received frames from CHAdeMO
($6044) Reset of CHAdeMO diags at end of charge
($6045) CHAdeMO nominal stop requested by either spot or vehicle
($604C) CHAdeMO emergency stop requested by spot
($6051) Ratio of present voltage at the begining of welding corresponding to a high voltage
($6052) Ratio of present voltage at the begining of welding corresponding to a low voltage
($6053) CHAdeMO emergency stop requested by vehicle
($605A) Present voltage when relays closed at beginning of welding test
($605C) Available charge power from the system
($6064) Battery requested current for external or internal charger
($606C) Network (Mains or CHADEMO) is ready to provide energy
($606E) Memorized value of the wake up activation
($6077) Input voltage of CHAdeMO relays diag done by EVC (I_QCRLY)
($607A) State of printed circuit board temperature sensor (TEMP_BOARD)
($607C) State of Enable HV sensor supply diag
($6092) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for Nissan plug type 2
($6094) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for RSA plug type 1
($6097) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for Nissan plug type 1
($6098) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor for RSA plug type 2
($609B) Configuration with CAN TCO temperature input
($6105) CHAdeMO connector proximity detection logic input
($610D) CHAdeMO plug high voltage sensor raw ADC input
($610F) Wire Water temperature raw ADC input
($6110) CHAdeMO high voltage sensor N input
($6111) CHAdeMO high voltage sensor P input
($6113) BCM wakeup command raw ADC input
($6116) EVC wakeup command raw ADC input
($6118) CHAdeMO relay interlock raw ADC input
($611A) DC IN interlock raw ADC input
($611B) Fuse box interlock raw ADC input
($611C) HV BATT interlock raw ADC input
($6124) Diag of H bridge N side

Item.Text: 0:Diagnosis of H bridge N side OK
1:Diagnosis of H bridge N side NOK

Data.Name: ($6125) Diag of H bridge P side

Item.Text: 0:Diagnosis of H bridge P side OK
1:Diagnosis of H bridge P side NOK

Data.Name: ($6126) Raw I_CTRLPILOT analog input ADC input
($612D) Number of times CHAdeMO relays open during charge (relays open with hi current)
($612E) Number of hot resets during CHAdeMO charge (relays open with hi current)
($612F) S2 relay control (OFF open, ON close) before synthesis with PLC toggle command
($6130) Status of real time clock periodical wakeup function
($6131) Sacha reset failure. Component Indicating a Failure detected failure
($6132) Sacha reset failure. Component Indicating a Failure diagnosis authorization

Item.Text: 0: No diagnosis authorization for Sacha reset failure
1: Diagnosis authorization for Sacha reset failure

Data.Name: ($6133) Enables sending on pin90 of the 20MHz clock in order to verify resonnator frequency during EOL test
($6134) Real time clock periodical wakeup request
($6135) Real time clock periodical wakeup request delay (states)
($613C) Real time clock periodical wakeup request delay (in minutes)
($613D) ARC and PTC interlock inversion configuration
($6144) Cause of reset detected by BSW

Item.Text: Bit 7: EMC perturbations on HW reset (POR_PSU_MCU)

Data.Name: ($6145) Cause of reset detected by BSW: TRPFirstTrapAddress_U32 (most significant bytes)
($6146) Cause of reset detected by BSW: TRPFirstTrapAddress_U32 (less significant bytes)
($6147) Variable traceability (bits 0 to 3) and Global Counter of Reset (bits 4 to 7)
($6153) Mains phase 1 current RMS value status
($6158) TRAP Class (8 bits) and IDNumber (8 bits)
($6159) Plug unlock when RMS current is still present configuration
($615B) Quick sleeping. Do not allow writing in dataflas
($2003) Raw Detection Logic line available resistor state

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Label.Text: => prise de la batterie haute tension => InterlockBatt = Open = Vsx_lbc_ilck_stt = 1 (visible sur la trame LBC_CANHS_R_03)
Conditions valable à partir du SC_501
